_meta.note: All genuine 5-star reviews compiled from Google (Martinez Dumpsters) and Yelp. One negative, unverifiable Yelp review (Max Z., Jul 2022) was intentionally excluded and must not be added. Google dates are approximate (relative timestamps); Yelp dates are exact. 'featured: true' reviews are the ones to spread across the site; 'service' is a placement hint.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Mario is the man! He squeezed me in with a bin rental on a last-minute call, dropped it off the next day, and the driver was courteous and accommodating about where we wanted it placed. I can't recommend this service enough!

reviews.name: Ashley H.
reviews.text: Martinez is top-tier on communication, scheduling, and reliability. There is no one else I would use in the area if I can help it. Always on time and able to work with our schedule. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Michael G.
reviews.text: Reliable service, responds to inquiries quickly, the owner is very helpful and easy to work with, and the driver who dropped off and picked up the dumpster was very courteous and respectful of my property.

reviews.name: John (general contractor)
reviews.text: As a general contractor I've used many different dumpster vendors, and they all seem to add hidden fees after they pick up. Martinez has on-time delivery, a sharp flat rate, and a reasonable offer for extended days. Finally, a straight-shooter.

reviews.name: Veronica M.
reviews.text: The owner was professional, polite, and helpful. He and one assistant did such a great job. I would definitely use this service again. Thank you guys.

reviews.name: Adriana T.
reviews.text: I'm so glad I hired Martinez. Everything was removed within 2 hours, and best of all it was very affordable. I'll be remodeling my home soon and will definitely be calling them again.

reviews.name: William A.
reviews.text: Mr. Martinez runs an excellent business in a very professional manner, going the extra mile with same-day delivery when needed. I highly recommend him — a 10+ out of 10.

reviews.name: Ramon O.
reviews.text: Very happy with their service! They showed up on time as promised, and the five-ton capacity container was clean.

reviews.name: Ricky T.
reviews.text: Mario's crew did an awesome job removing everything that needed to go, and in a timely manner. The area was left clean. I recommend this company and will use them again. A+.

reviews.name: Kathy K.
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things! Mario and his crew are amazing — on time, very quick, good prices, and very clean. They left everything spotless both times I've used them, and they're very friendly. I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Fernando R.
reviews.text: Fast, quick, and reliable service. I called for a quote and the price was unbeatable for the amount I needed hauled away. They came first thing in the morning with a courtesy call to confirm. I'll be recommending them to anyone in need.

reviews.name: Blanca G.
reviews.text: We had an excellent experience. Martinez's team was on time, efficient, courteous, and friendly. I would definitely recommend them to friends and family and will be using their services again!

reviews.name: Jeremiah M.
reviews.text: The most professional and most effective, with extremely good competitive prices. I've used them numerous times — professional and fast every time. I would highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Patty Z.
reviews.text: Martinez was quick to respond to my call for help removing big unneeded equipment and yard waste. They scheduled a pickup and were timely, and careful moving items in tight spaces. Dependable — definitely a returning customer!

reviews.name: Rich S.
reviews.text: Hired Mario to haul a bunch — like 5+ tons — of drywall, plaster, and other debris. He was professional and quick, the price was fair, and I'd use them again for sure.

reviews.name: Don L.
reviews.text: Mario and his team were punctual, fast, and the cheapest for our junk removal. Very friendly too. I'd highly recommend and will be calling them next time I need big items gone.

reviews.name: Jeremiah M.
reviews.text: Top-notch. Incredibly prompt, professional, responsive, and easy to work with. They completely cleared out all the junk from our house in San Dimas and their prices are unbeatable.

reviews.name: Steve & Deborah S.
reviews.text: They responded quickly and sent out a clean dumpster in a timely manner. Easy to set up and pay, all online. They answered texts and calls. Very pleased and would recommend to anyone!

reviews.name: Aileen M.
reviews.text: We needed to empty our home, garage, and shed before selling. They quickly and efficiently removed the debris we stacked, then came back on a second trip for furniture and more. Certainly deserve 5 stars.

reviews.name: Joanna D.
reviews.text: Mario was an excellent communicator throughout and followed through on everything he said. He and his guys work extremely hard and get the job done. They removed concrete as well as tile and wood flooring and did a great job.

reviews.name: P. C.
reviews.text: Junk Guys got the job done — professional, on time, and great communication. They gave me updates when they were on their way. I'd use them again without hesitation.

reviews.name: Erick M.
reviews.text: Fast and professional. In less than an hour they had my garage clean. Would definitely call them again. Thanks Mario!

reviews.name: Michael G.
reviews.text: Mario and Eric are good people. I've used them twice so far and will call again soon — great prices, and very respectful, neat, and clean.

reviews.name: Dean
reviews.text: Martinez was prompt getting me an estimate and flexible with the time and day I needed. The workers were courteous and quick. I'll use the company again soon.

reviews.name: Donna F.
reviews.text: Mario's crew were fast, efficient, and great on price. This is our third time using them and we'll be using them again.

reviews.name: Lola S.
reviews.text: Awesome crew and work. Quick and efficient. Great price as well. Would highly recommend them. Thanks a bunch!

reviews.name: Sandra L.
reviews.text: I'll use them going forward for all my clean-ups. They were on time, reliable, and very professional. They went above and beyond! Will recommend to everyone I know.

reviews.name: Jennifer O.
reviews.text: So friendly and efficient. I used them for an office clean-out and the process was quick and well done. I would highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Marina V.
reviews.text: Very pleased with Martinez Junk Removal. They're always on time, very friendly, and affordable. I'd recommend them to anyone.

reviews.name: Alberto S.
reviews.text: A great guy, always on time, and if anything changes he'll give you a call to let you know — communication is very important. Definitely recommend giving Martinez a call.

reviews.name: Amin G.
reviews.text: Great service and prompt. Responds right away and was very helpful. Did a very good job on the garbage removal.

reviews.name: Kevin C.
reviews.text: Absolutely a great experience! Came on his day off to work around my schedule. Can't be more satisfied. Definitely recommend!

reviews.name: Chiquita E.
reviews.text: I've used their services on more than one occasion. They are prompt, professional, courteous, and overall just fantastic!

reviews.name: Fernando L.
reviews.text: Responsive, got the job done, and had reasonable pricing. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Joel C.
reviews.text: Great customer service, on time, and good communication. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Jeremiah V.
reviews.text: Very professional and friendly, and they made very quick work of the junk. I was very pleased with the whole experience.

reviews.name: Alma A.
reviews.text: Workers arrived in a timely fashion and dismantled a canopy frame and more. They were meticulous in their approach and efficiency.

reviews.name: Paul U.
reviews.text: The Junk Guys were on time, on budget, and — as we say in the corporate world — delivered as promised.

reviews.name: Kelly S.
reviews.text: Great customer service, showed up on time, and were very fast and efficient!

reviews.name: Abe B.
reviews.text: They do a great job at good prices.

reviews.name: Espie R.
reviews.text: The guys were very nice and professional. Thank God for the Junk Guys.

reviews.name: Steven R.
reviews.text: Fair price, showed up on time, and took care of the job fast.

reviews.name: Anthony
reviews.text: Punctual, hard-working guys!

reviews.name: Erick E.
reviews.text: I recommend this company to everyone; they provide excellent service.

reviews.name: Corey B.
reviews.text: Easy and fast. Called and had no issue for drop-off. Call-off was as easy as calling for one. Pickup was easy.

reviews.name: Nichole R.
reviews.text: Looking to get rid of some junk? I was beyond grateful for JunkGuys. They respond right away and have great, reasonable pricing. They even hauled away a quad that had been sitting in my backyard, plus sand, rocks, and clothes. The stuff you toss, they also donate, which is great.

reviews.name: Lucia S.
reviews.text: Solo quiero agradecer a Mario por su rápida respuesta al darme una cotización. Llegaron puntuales a la hora acordada, muy rápidos en su trabajo y muy limpios. Muy satisfecha con ellos — los recomiendo 100%.

reviews.name: Rene V.
reviews.text: Mario and team worked very hard to finish our job. Great communication and price. I'd highly recommend them for any kind of dirt, boulder, or debris removal.

reviews.name: Jon M.
reviews.text: I can't say enough about Mario and his team. On time, priced right, and a pleasure to do business with. I'm sure I'll use his company again. 5 stars +.

reviews.name: Kathleen L.
reviews.text: Really great to work with — 24/7 call and can pick up anytime. It works well with our film production. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Mario was absolutely amazing. Quick quote, great price, and he loaded all my junk fast. Then I found more junk in a closet I forgot — he came back the next day right after I messaged him and got it done. Lifesaver! By far the best junk hauling.

reviews.name: John P.
reviews.text: Had a load of yard waste to be hauled away. Of all the quotes, only JunkGuys was reasonably priced with a quick response time. Mario was friendly and accommodating and was at my house within 2 hours of my request. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: C. C.
reviews.text: I could not ask for better service! I had a whole side yard full of stuff and they cleared it all out. Everything was left clean, they were on time and super fast, and the cost was better than the other quotes and very fair.

reviews.name: Robert V.
reviews.text: Tenants left my rental's house and garage full of broken furniture, garbage, and discarded items. Mario was easy to reach and prompt. His crew showed up on time and within hours had the entire property spotless — no surprise extra charges. I'm keeping his number for the next job.

reviews.name: Chris O.
reviews.text: These guys were absolute MVPs — professional and quick. Highly recommend. Support local business; don't use the big corporate haulers!

reviews.name: Peter P.
reviews.text: Had Mario haul away some pallets and leftover pieces from a renovation. He handled it quickly and swept everything clean for a very reasonable price. Easy to communicate with, prompt, and courteous. A+!

reviews.name: Matthew A.
reviews.text: I underestimated how much trash I'd have moving out and needed a dumpster ASAP. Waste Management told me — by recording, of course — it'd be 48 hours before someone even returned my call. Mario contacted me immediately and got me what I needed, when I needed it. Prompt, polite, professional. Don't waste your time with Waste Management — call Mario.

reviews.name: Halecia G.
reviews.text: We were doing some cleaning and researched various dumpster rentals. Going with JunkGuys was a great decision. Mario hauled away our junk from the yard and garage, was on time, and worked with a pleasant attitude. I'd recommend his service.

reviews.name: Charissa A.
reviews.text: Mario came early to start the work and removed all the garbage and debris from our home project for a reasonable price. I definitely recommend him for garbage and debris disposal.

reviews.name: Saul G.
reviews.text: I'm one to never give reviews, but this company did such a great job I had to. I needed junk gone on short notice, and after a quick quote he was at my house in less than 30 minutes. Very nice, very professional. I'll definitely refer him to friends and family.

reviews.name: Matthew A.
reviews.text: An amazing experience. We just moved and had a lot of boxes and trash but not enough room in our bins. Mario got back to me within minutes, arrived on time, and took about five minutes to remove all our junk. Professional and personable — highly recommend.

reviews.name: Danise B.
reviews.text: Mario is the best! Super quick to provide a low quote, came out on a Saturday morning, and hauled a garage full of trash in minutes. It's such a great feeling to have years of junk cleared out. I highly recommend.

reviews.name: J. Adams
reviews.text: Showed up on time, professional and friendly, and worked hard. I appreciated the care they took disassembling my old spa — they even disconnected the electricity and took all the pieces with them. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Charlie R.
reviews.text: First time using a junk removal service. I sent a few photos and got a price estimate right away — such a great deal I booked it. They showed up an hour and a half after I booked, removed my junk quickly, and were on their way. Great service start to finish.

reviews.name: Neil N.
reviews.text: I've used Mario for two projects and both were fantastic. First they removed about 1,000 sq ft of nasty carpet, scraped the glue down to the sub-floor, and hauled it all to the dump. The second time they took out a 1960s cement flower bed and even brought a jackhammer to remove the concrete base embedded in the soil. They do more than haul junk — if you have a demo-and-removal project, these guys are a one-stop shop.

reviews.name: Virginia E.
reviews.text: Excellent service for removing all my junk. The work was done quickly and clean, and the price was good. They responded as soon as I called. I'll definitely call again when I clean out my garage.

reviews.name: Kathy M.
reviews.text: Mario sent me an estimate by text, arrived an hour later, and removed our junk. Great price, great communication, great service — and they even swept the area before leaving. I've used national chains that charged 3x what JunkGuys charged; I'd call Mario again without hesitation.

reviews.name: Jennifer O.
reviews.text: I hired them for an apartment clean-out and I'm so pleased. Quick and very professional, and the staff was friendly and made me feel comfortable throughout. Highly recommend for quick, efficient service.

reviews.name: Shawna C.
reviews.text: I needed trash hauled from my garage. Mario responded right away, came out within a few hours, was fast, and the price was right. I'd recommend this company to everyone — great service and pricing.

reviews.name: Kris B.
reviews.text: We needed a low-boy dumpster last minute. I believe the business was closed when I called, but Mario took my call and helped us pull it off — delivered next day. We also hired some of their team to haul the heavy debris. Awesome. Amazing company!

reviews.name: R. L.
reviews.text: Mario was a complete lifesaver on a project that turned out much bigger than expected — months of water-soaked, rotten yard waste that was difficult to dig out. He took it on with a good-natured attitude and did the job efficiently and thoroughly. Always responded quickly, with convenient contactless payment. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: My husband and I were very pleased. Mario was beyond helpful and kind. So glad we called JunkGuys — we'll definitely use them again for any future needs.

reviews.name: Verlyn O.
reviews.text: The real deal. Scheduled an appointment and they showed up on time and did an amazing job at extremely reasonable prices. He even lowered the price from the original quote because some items didn't need hauling. Professional and courteous.

reviews.name: Jerry A.
reviews.text: I put in a bid for construction/trash removal and got a quick response. Mario was the most reasonable and clearly explained the rates. He said he'd be at my house at 8 and showed up at 7:50 ready to work. At the end, he and his employee cleaned up and made it look better than before. I'll absolutely use them again.

reviews.name: Sarah N.
reviews.text: JunkGuys are amazingly fast and professional, helping me get rid of all my backyard junk. Thank you for lifting a burden off my chest. Pure vibes.

reviews.name: Daniel G.
reviews.text: They removed my jacuzzi for a decent price and came within the hour of my request. Mario is professional and left the area clean. I'm happy.

reviews.name: Tasha K.
reviews.text: I called Mario in the morning and he picked up a couch within 30 minutes — on a Sunday! His costs were much lower than other estimates, and he's super friendly. I'd definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Joseph L.
reviews.text: Mario provided a quote within minutes, removed my couch the same day, and sent me pictures immediately. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Shirley A.
reviews.text: Mario exceeded my expectations. I asked for a quote Thursday night, he responded within minutes, and the next day he picked up all our junk. Very reasonable price, fast and efficient. My first time using this kind of service and I'm so glad I found him.

reviews.name: John C.
reviews.text: What a rescue! I had plenty of stuff piling up and Mario made it too easy. Quick to respond, gave me a decent quote, and it was all gone within the hour.

reviews.name: Andy L.
reviews.text: Mario and his crew were solid — on time, fast, clean, and extremely kind. He got us out of a pinch and out-priced his competitors. Please keep him in mind when you're shopping around.

reviews.name: Ricky G.
reviews.text: I left a message for a quote and got a call back within 10 minutes with an excellent price. Renters had left tons of trash and furniture in the garage and backyard; JunkGuys were professional and had the job done in a few hours. Good work!

reviews.name: Janet S.
reviews.text: My husband rented a concrete container from them. These guys are friendly, professional, and fast, and they picked up our filled container with no problems. Thanks!

reviews.name: Ed D.
reviews.text: Martinez Junk Removal is responsive and works with your schedule at reasonable prices.

reviews.name: Andy N.
reviews.text: I set an appointment and they arrived at the scheduled time — very courteous and professional. They did a marvelous job with pickup and cleaning. I recommend JunkGuys.

reviews.name: Zachary R.
reviews.text: Thank you for your awesome service! Well informed and consistently good business. I'd vote for this good guy any day — will be back for more.

reviews.name: Rei S.
reviews.text: I sent Mario pictures of the stuff I needed hauled and he gave me a very reasonable price. I needed it ASAP; he said he'd be there within an hour and arrived on time. Reasonable price and prompt, professional service.

reviews.name: Samantha S.
reviews.text: I had junk that sat for months and got scattered by the wind. Mario responded quickly with a reasonable price — especially compared to others — and picked it all up within two hours of my request. Reasonable and efficient.

reviews.name: Matthew B.
reviews.text: Requested an estimate on a Saturday night and got a response almost instantly. Mario's prices were very reasonable and he showed up the next morning to pick up junk after I cleaned out my garage. Friendly, easygoing, and fast. Beyond satisfied!

reviews.name: Amanda W.
reviews.text: Mario helped us out of a nightmare after remodeling our kitchen. Despite renting a large dumpster, the city refused to haul it because it was more than a quarter full. JunkGuys jumped in and emptied it just two hours after I contacted them. We'll only use JunkGuys from now on!

reviews.name: Samantha B.
reviews.text: If I could give 100 stars I would. Mario is prompt, efficient, honest, and quick. Another company flaked on me, and Mario came out within the same hour, hauled everything, and had amazing customer service. The best, hands down.

reviews.name: Brian A.
reviews.text: Mario accommodated me on one hour's notice and hauled my entire bedroom set. He was punctual, super professional, and quickly loaded everything. He charges very competitive rates compared to other haulers serving the Chino Hills area. Will definitely use him again.

reviews.name: Cecilia M.
reviews.text: Thank you Mario! Very professional, great job on the yard clearance. On time and fast, and he left the yard very clean. Great price for a great job — I recommend his service.

reviews.name: Maria R.
reviews.text: I just got my garage cleaned out and it looks great! Mario was prompt and available right away, and reasonably priced, so I booked him immediately. I'll definitely recommend him.

reviews.name: Karla C.
reviews.text: JunkGuys LA is amazing. Mario went out of his way to help us clean out our garage. We're definitely using this company again. Thank you for everything!

reviews.name: Elizabeth S.
reviews.text: Moving out of my upstairs apartment, I needed furniture removed. I called for a quote and spoke to Mario — very friendly and professional. I was happy with the price and service and will definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Christina M.
reviews.text: Best dumpster company in town. They were on time, with great customer service and prices. I'd definitely recommend, 100%.

reviews.name: Cali E.
reviews.text: A great company to work with. Mario, the owner, is very responsive, helpful, and most of all respectful. Working with them on our project has been an absolute pleasure. Will return for sure!

reviews.name: Zach K.
reviews.text: These guys do it right every time. Will always call them when I need it. Would recommend to friends and family.

reviews.name: Bronson M.
reviews.text: I used to work for a junk removal service, so I know the scope and typical pricing. These guys were extremely fast, courteous, professional, and competitively priced. When the truck seemed full, they insisted they could make room and even suggested ways to make my backyard cleaner at no extra cost. I had over 2 tons of bulky junk and they left the place spotless in about 25 minutes.

reviews.name: Jordan S.
reviews.text: Great attitude, punctual, respectful, fast, and above and beyond! Last-minute job — they responded quickly and arrived 5–10 minutes early. After a quick walkthrough they took everything and left six rooms spotless. Detail-oriented and polite. Hire these guys; you won't regret it.

reviews.name: Daniel M.
reviews.text: Quick work on a bed frame and mattress removal over the weekend. Mario and his team were on time and polite. I'll definitely recommend them to friends and family and call them next time I need them.

reviews.name: Joanna M.
reviews.text: Thanks Mario! He came to take care of my side yard that had junk piled up. He and his partner arrived on time, picked everything up quickly, and cleaned the area when done. Give JunkGuys a call if you're looking to remove junk.

reviews.name: Jeanne M.
reviews.text: These guys were awesome — quick response, very reasonable prices, excellent work, and quickly done.

reviews.name: Pascual G.
reviews.text: As professional as they come. I asked Mario for a quote and he got back within minutes with a price no one could beat. In less than 24 hours they were hauling my trash away and made sure to take everything. Exceeded my expectations.

reviews.name: Luci H.
reviews.text: I highly recommend this company. Mario is very nice and professional and works fast. He gave me a fair estimate and showed up early, with a call beforehand. I've called him again to remove tree trimmings and a trunk — he responded right away, arrived promptly, and even remembered me from months before. My go-to junk removal guy.

reviews.name: Eduardo G.
reviews.text: Highly recommend! From requesting a quote to everything being picked up was well under an hour. They replied within 5 minutes, were at my place within 20, and took no more than 20 minutes to haul everything. Great service.

reviews.name: Chris L.
reviews.text: The price was very reasonable, they were on time, and very friendly. I'd definitely recommend. Thank you for all your help.

reviews.name: Anthony G.
reviews.text: Great service and communication! Professional and in uniform, two big guys moved my very heavy, obnoxious piano. They had the best price out of anyone in the area — by 50% or more. Seriously great deal, and they're on top of their craft. I'll absolutely use them again.

reviews.name: Julie M.
reviews.text: Couldn't be more pleased. Response within minutes, a fair price, and he was at my house in less than an hour. I got more help than I originally requested — Mario kept asking if there was anything more he could take. Moving cross-country was stressful and he really helped. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jen V.
reviews.text: A great experience! Once I requested a quote he came by within 30 minutes to give one. His prices were affordable and he was reliable, friendly, professional, and did everything we agreed to. We fully support small businesses — this is definitely one of the great ones!
